{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Result Desk Officer",
  "description": "E-Clinic &amp; Diagnostic Limited is a premier healthcare provider based in Abuja, Nigeria, specializing in diagnostic services and clinical care. Established with a focus on offering cutting-edge medical diagnostics, the clinic utilizes state-of-the-art technology to deliver highly accurate and efficient laboratory, radiological, and therapeutic services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Result Desk Officer

Job Location: Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Receive, verify, and organize laboratory test results before distribution.
	Ensure all test results are accurately recorded and filed in the laboratory management system.
	Assist in preparing and printing patient reports for collection.
	Support laboratory staff in handling paperwork and data entry tasks.
	Communicate with doctors, nurses, and other medical personnel regarding test results as needed.
	Other responsibilities as assigned by your supervisor.


Job Requirements


	OND / NCE in Science, Health Science, Administration, Secretarial Studies, or related disciplines.
	Only ND and NCE holders should apply.
	Strong attention to detail and ability to work in a fast-paced medical environment.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel) and medical record-keeping software.
	Ability to maintain strict confidentiality of patient information.
	Basic understanding of medical laboratory operations and procedures is an advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified cndidates should send their CV to: career@eclinic.ng using &quot;Result Desk Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail

Note: Only ND and NCE holders should apply.",

Result Desk Officer Job at E-Clinic & Diagnostic Limited




        
    

        
        E-Clinic & Diagnostic Limited is a premier healthcare provider based in Abuja, Nigeria, specializing in diagnostic services and clinical care. Established with a focus on offering cutting-edge medical diagnostics, the clinic utilizes state-of-the-art technology to deliver highly accurate and efficient laboratory, radiological, and therapeutic services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Result Desk Officer

Job Location: Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Receive, verify, and organize laboratory test results before distribution.
	Ensure all test results are accurately recorded and filed in the laboratory management system.
	Assist in preparing and printing patient reports for collection.
	Support laboratory staff in handling paperwork and data entry tasks.
	Communicate with doctors, nurses, and other medical personnel regarding test results as needed.
	Other responsibilities as assigned by your supervisor.


Job Requirements


	OND / NCE in Science, Health Science, Administration, Secretarial Studies, or related disciplines.
	Only ND and NCE holders should apply.
	Strong attention to detail and ability to work in a fast-paced medical environment.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel) and medical record-keeping software.
	Ability to maintain strict confidentiality of patient information.
	Basic understanding of medical laboratory operations and procedures is an advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified cndidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Result Desk Officer" as the subject of the mail

Note: Only ND and NCE holders should apply.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Executive",
  "description": "Katchey Company is an ISO 9001:2015 world-leading certified supplier of reliable science/medical laboratory equipment and chemicals. Our products and solutions support organizations that use science. Katchey Company Limited is a one-stop shop for all laboratories equipments, reagents, consumables, and chemicals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Executive
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking to hire a Front Desk Executive who will provide administrative and customer support to the organization by ensuring efficient reception operations, visitor management, communication handling, and coordination of front office activities.
	The role is critical to enhancing workplace efficiency, maintaining a professional corporate image, and supporting the achievement of the company&rsquo;s strategic goals and objectives.


Job Description


	Ensure that janitorial cleaning is carried out on the entire premises to the standards agreed with the contractor and maintain a schedule.
	Identify business prospects for the company through daily review of newspapers, emails, phone calls, and channel enquiries and make requests to the right department and follow up to ensure prompt response to enquiries and requests.
	Monitor all movement within the front office area.
	Prompt and courteous attendance to visitors within the premises.
	Generate weekly reports.
	Receipt and registration of all mails and send the same in a timely and efficient manner to the appropriate departments.
	Ensure outgoing and incoming calls are registered in the outgoing and incoming call books.
	Timely escalation of issues that cannot be resolved to the line manager.
	Ensure monthly cleaning of areas, paying attention to critical areas.
	Any other duties that may be assigned by the Line Manager, from time to time, in the course of work and in furtherance of the Company&rsquo;s strategic objectives.


Academic Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND (Minimum of Second Class Upper or Upper Credit) in any Science course.


Working Experience:


	Minimum of two (2) years of relevant work experience in:
	
		A laboratory environment (Analyst or Laboratory Technologist), or
		Administrative environment.
	
	


Skills:


	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and general computer applications
	Strong report writing and documentation skills
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Ability to multitask and manage time effectively
	Proactive, adaptable, and solution-oriented mindset
	Willingness and ability to learn and apply new concepts quickly.


Salary
N150,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: jobs@katchey.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Front Desk Executive Job at Katchey Company




        
    

        
        Katchey Company is an ISO 9001:2015 world-leading certified supplier of reliable science/medical laboratory equipment and chemicals. Our products and solutions support organizations that use science. Katchey Company Limited is a one-stop shop for all laboratories equipments, reagents, consumables, and chemicals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Executive
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking to hire a Front Desk Executive who will provide administrative and customer support to the organization by ensuring efficient reception operations, visitor management, communication handling, and coordination of front office activities.
	The role is critical to enhancing workplace efficiency, maintaining a professional corporate image, and supporting the achievement of the company’s strategic goals and objectives.


Job Description


	Ensure that janitorial cleaning is carried out on the entire premises to the standards agreed with the contractor and maintain a schedule.
	Identify business prospects for the company through daily review of newspapers, emails, phone calls, and channel enquiries and make requests to the right department and follow up to ensure prompt response to enquiries and requests.
	Monitor all movement within the front office area.
	Prompt and courteous attendance to visitors within the premises.
	Generate weekly reports.
	Receipt and registration of all mails and send the same in a timely and efficient manner to the appropriate departments.
	Ensure outgoing and incoming calls are registered in the outgoing and incoming call books.
	Timely escalation of issues that cannot be resolved to the line manager.
	Ensure monthly cleaning of areas, paying attention to critical areas.
	Any other duties that may be assigned by the Line Manager, from time to time, in the course of work and in furtherance of the Company’s strategic objectives.


Academic Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND (Minimum of Second Class Upper or Upper Credit) in any Science course.


Working Experience:


	Minimum of two (2) years of relevant work experience in:
	
		A laboratory environment (Analyst or Laboratory Technologist), or
		Administrative environment.
	
	


Skills:


	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and general computer applications
	Strong report writing and documentation skills
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Ability to multitask and manage time effectively
	Proactive, adaptable, and solution-oriented mindset
	Willingness and ability to learn and apply new concepts quickly.


Salary
N150,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Information Officer",
  "description": "KEDI Healthcare Industries (Nigeria) Limited is a renowned multinational Healthcare Company. KEDI Healthcare Industries (Nigeria) Limited is a renowned multinational Healthcare Company. We are expanding and looking for enthusiastic professionals to join our dynamic team. If you are driven to succeed and passionate about making an impact, we want YOU!

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Information Officer

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a creative Content and Social Media Executive to be the voice of our brand.
	You will create marketing content, manage social media, leverage AI tools, and design graphics and short-form videos to boost brand visibility.


Key Responsibilities


	Create engaging and persuasive marketing and social media content for company materials and digital platforms, ensuring alignment with the brand&rsquo;s voice and marketing objectives.
	Manage the company&rsquo;s social media platforms by scheduling content, engaging with the online community, monitoring trends, and tracking performance to improve brand visibility and engagement.
	Utilize AI tools to generate content ideas, draft and optimize content, while staying updated on emerging AI trends to enhance workflow and content quality.
	Design simple, visually appealing graphics and create short-form video content for social media using tools such as Canva, Photoshop, CapCut, or similar software.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree and above in Mass Communication, English, Marketing, Advertisement, Media or related fields.
	1&ndash;2 years of proven experience in content creation, social media management, or digital marketing.
	Excellent writing skills with the ability to produce clear and engaging content.
	Strong understanding of Nigerian social media trends and user behaviour.
	Proficient in using AI and design tools to create and optimize visual content efficiently.
	Video editing skills, including vertical video formats.


Why Join KEDI?


	Be part of a reputable, multinational healthcare companywith a strong presence and growth trajectory in Nigeria and beyond.
	Work in a dynamic, collaborative, and supportive environmentwhere your ideas are valued and your contributions make a real impact.
	Enjoy a competitive compensation packageincluding performance incentives, health benefits, and regular salary reviews&mdash;because we believe in rewarding talent.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional developmentthrough training, mentorship, and exposure to global best practices.
	Job security and stabilitywithin an established organization that prioritizes employee welfare and long-term success


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send a detailed Resume with a valid phone number to: hr@kedihealth.com using the Job Position as the email subject.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	Multiple applications will result in disqualification.
	Interviews will be conducted at our Head Office in Ikoyi, Lagos State, and successful candidates will undergo a two-week training at the same location before starting full job responsibilities.
	For more information, contact 08131028762.

Information Officer Job at KEDI Healthcare Industries




        
    

        
        KEDI Healthcare Industries (Nigeria) Limited is a renowned multinational Healthcare Company. KEDI Healthcare Industries (Nigeria) Limited is a renowned multinational Healthcare Company. We are expanding and looking for enthusiastic professionals to join our dynamic team. If you are driven to succeed and passionate about making an impact, we want YOU!

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Information Officer

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a creative Content and Social Media Executive to be the voice of our brand.
	You will create marketing content, manage social media, leverage AI tools, and design graphics and short-form videos to boost brand visibility.


Key Responsibilities


	Create engaging and persuasive marketing and social media content for company materials and digital platforms, ensuring alignment with the brand’s voice and marketing objectives.
	Manage the company’s social media platforms by scheduling content, engaging with the online community, monitoring trends, and tracking performance to improve brand visibility and engagement.
	Utilize AI tools to generate content ideas, draft and optimize content, while staying updated on emerging AI trends to enhance workflow and content quality.
	Design simple, visually appealing graphics and create short-form video content for social media using tools such as Canva, Photoshop, CapCut, or similar software.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree and above in Mass Communication, English, Marketing, Advertisement, Media or related fields.
	1–2 years of proven experience in content creation, social media management, or digital marketing.
	Excellent writing skills with the ability to produce clear and engaging content.
	Strong understanding of Nigerian social media trends and user behaviour.
	Proficient in using AI and design tools to create and optimize visual content efficiently.
	Video editing skills, including vertical video formats.


Why Join KEDI?


	Be part of a reputable, multinational healthcare companywith a strong presence and growth trajectory in Nigeria and beyond.
	Work in a dynamic, collaborative, and supportive environmentwhere your ideas are valued and your contributions make a real impact.
	Enjoy a competitive compensation packageincluding performance incentives, health benefits, and regular salary reviews—because we believe in rewarding talent.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional developmentthrough training, mentorship, and exposure to global best practices.
	Job security and stabilitywithin an established organization that prioritizes employee welfare and long-term success


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send a detailed Resume with a valid phone number to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the email subject.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	Multiple applications will result in disqualification.
	Interviews will be conducted at our Head Office in Ikoyi, Lagos State, and successful candidates will undergo a two-week training at the same location before starting full job responsibilities.
	For more information, contact 08131028762.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
